name: agent-coherence
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the agent-coherence Claude Code plugin. Coherence for the prose subset of project rules that can't be expressed as policy.

plugins.name: agent-coherence
plugins.description: Coherence for the prose subset of project rules that can't be expressed as policy. CLAUDE.md rules about state — 'plan.md is v3 now', 'session B just edited the file you're about to write' — can't be expressed as permissions.deny. This plugin surfaces those state changes across parallel Claude Code sessions sharing the same workspace via warnings injected into the agent's own context. Single-user single-host workstation; macOS/Linux/WSL2. Warn-only in v0.1.1.
